password.description: Password to join the meeting with maximum 10 characters

scheduleFor.description: Schedule meeting for someone else from your account, provide their email ID

audio.description: Determine how participants can join audio portion of the meeting

hostVideo.description: Whether to start a video when host joins the meeting

joinBeforeHost.description: Whether to allow participants to join the meeting before host starts it

muteUponEntry.description: Whether to mute participants upon entry

participantVideo.description: Whether to start a video when participant joins the meeting

registrationType.description: Registration type. Used for recurring meetings with fixed time only.

1.displayName: Attendees register once and can attend any of the occurrences

2.displayName: Attendees need to register for every occurrence

3.displayName: Attendees register once and can choose one or more occurrences to attend

watermark.description: Whether to add a watermark when viewing a shared screen

startTime.description: Start time should be used only for scheduled or recurring meetings with fixed time

timeZone.description: Time zone used in the response. The default is the time zone of the calendar. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

3.displayName: Recurring Meeting with No Fixed Time

showPreviousOccurrences.description: Whether to view meeting details of all previous occurrences of the recurring meeting

scheduleForReminder.description: Whether to notify hosts and alternative hosts about meeting cancellation via email

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

scheduled.description: This includes all valid past meetings, live meetings and upcoming scheduled meetings

upcoming.description: All upcoming meetings including live meetings
